# Blog Feature Image Guidelines

Stock imagery or icons should clearly reflect the blog topic. When a specific trade or profession is mentioned, the image should feature a person working in that field. Including relevant technology or devices is recommended to help illustrate the role of technology/product within the industry.

# **Simpro**

Simpro requires the same image to be supplied in two different sizes:

- Listing Thumbnail  
- Article Feature Image

## Listing Thumbnail

![][image1]

| Usage | Blog Listing image on the content hub |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Canva template** | [https://www.canva.com/design/DAGsuFWNcFw/mj8F2k1B5yQZzY\_qs8BNAA/edit?utm\_content=DAGsuFWNcFw\&utm\_campaign=designshare\&utm\_medium=link2\&utm\_source=sharebutton](https://www.canva.com/design/DAGsuFWNcFw/mj8F2k1B5yQZzY_qs8BNAA/edit?utm_content=DAGsuFWNcFw&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=sharebutton) |
| **Image Size** | **Width:** 924px **Height:** 520px |
| **Special Guidelines/Treatments** | **Icon Placement:** The [white Simpro Torx](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LUUqBRIpRQ0VQARFOtJj-7_Qg6gXI7Lf/view?usp=sharing,%20https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OjP1WsopvOW1MxO7R6sODhMMPVxoDVHP/view?usp=sharing,%20https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Tqs1Ret7ONaP3-Uci4EOa6Md4LJW6CkP/view?usp=sharing)  should always appear in the **bottom-right corner** of the frame at **290 × 290 px**, set to **40% opacity**. Position it **745 px from the left edge** of the frame and **286 px from the top**.![][image2] |

## Article Feature image

![][image3]

| Usage | Narrow feature image on the top of the blog article |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Image Size** | **Width:** 960px **Height:** 250px |
| **Special Guidelines/Treatments** | No treatment necessary |

# **BigChange**

![][image4]  
![][image5]

| Usage | Blog feature image used on the blog listing and article pages |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Canva template** | [https://www.canva.com/design/DAGsD0Db0uQ/sj\_gXjlercqm67PchnOQbw/edit?utm\_content=DAGsD0Db0uQ\&utm\_campaign=designshare\&utm\_medium=link2\&utm\_source=sharebutton](https://www.canva.com/design/DAGsD0Db0uQ/sj_gXjlercqm67PchnOQbw/edit?utm_content=DAGsD0Db0uQ&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=sharebutton) |
| **Image Size** | **Width:** 768px **Height:** 432px |
| **Special Guidelines/Treatments** | **Icon Placement:** The blue BigChange icon should always appear in the **bottom-right corner** of the frame, sized at **226px × 226 px**, **rotated −45°**, and set to **52% opacity**. Position it **536 px from the left edge** of the frame and **200 px from the top**.![][image6] |

# **ClockShark**

![][image7]  
![][image8]

| Usage | Blog feature image used on the blog listing and article pages |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Canva template** | [https://www.canva.com/design/DAGunn44YnI/ucXHKOVU7KoqPIUZpdhCPg/edit?utm\_content=DAGunn44YnI\&utm\_campaign=designshare\&utm\_medium=link2\&utm\_source=sharebutton](https://www.canva.com/design/DAGunn44YnI/ucXHKOVU7KoqPIUZpdhCPg/edit?utm_content=DAGunn44YnI&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=sharebutton) |
| **Image Size** | **Width:** 1040px **Height:** 520px |
| **Special Guidelines/Treatments** | **Background** Apply a **90° linear gradient background** from **\#153243 to \#005288** **Image placement** Place the image **centered on top of the gradient** Framed at **964 × 450 px**, with a **25 px corner radius**. ![][image9] |

# **AroFlo**

![][image10]  
![][image11]

| Usage | Blog feature image used on the blog listing and article pages |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Canva template** | [https://www.canva.com/design/DAGFvcyo8Is/f3sIW\_NdeQYBL5uoHBD-zQ/edit?utm\_content=DAGFvcyo8Is\&utm\_campaign=designshare\&utm\_medium=link2\&utm\_source=sharebutton](https://www.canva.com/design/DAGFvcyo8Is/f3sIW_NdeQYBL5uoHBD-zQ/edit?utm_content=DAGFvcyo8Is&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=sharebutton) |
| **Image Size** | **Width:** 1200px **Height:** 630px |
| **Special Guidelines/Treatments** | **Background** Alternate background colours between: **\#00A3D9**, **\#01B59A**, **\#D07CB3**, and **\#6667AB**. Apply a **subtle transparent pattern overlay** on all backgrounds. **Icon Placement** Use a **white line-style icon**. Icon placement should **alternate between the left and right sides** of the frame across tiles. Maintain **minimum side margins of 110 px**. Ensure clear spacing from both text and frame edges. **Title Text** Title placement should **alternate opposite the icon** (right when the icon is left, and vice versa). Text sits inside a **black rounded container**. Font size should range between **38.5–40.5 px**, adjusted based on length of the title **Spacing & Layout** Maintain **consistent clear spacing** between text, icon, and frame edges to preserve balance and readability. ![][image12] |
